results.title: 'Perfect bill of health': Doctor says US President Trump 'in excellent health' after annual checkup
results.description: Trump health update: The annual physical examination memorandum on Friday (local time) stated that Trump is in "excellent health" following his comprehensive medical evaluation on Tuesday (May 26) conducted at Walter Reed National Military Medical Center.

results.title: Portion of Platform Shed Collapses at Lucknow Station, Three Injured
results.description: According to railway officials, passengers were waiting on the platform when a large section of the shed collapsed and partially fell towards the railway track, triggering panic among commuters.

results.title: Arsenal vs PSG, Champions League final — Main talking points before UCL 2025-26 finale
results.description: Arsenal vs PSG — Read five major talking points before the UEFA Champions League 2025-26 final where Arsenal eyes maiden UCL title against defending champion PSG.

results.title: ‘Blind checking’, series of technical issues: Red flags CBSE ‘ignored’ before OSM rollout
results.description: A report prepared after a trial of the on-screen marking system in January 2026 flagged at least 36 technical, operational and evaluation-related concerns.

results.title: Eight rescued after rollercoaster stalls 100 feet above ground in Texas
results.description: New Delhi: Eight people were on the rollercoaster, and they were safely brought to the ground when it stalled at Pleasure Pier in Galveston. The reason that the ride broke down and got stuck at the top of the structure is unclear, but at the top of the ride, the people were trapped very high [...] The post Eight rescued after rollercoaster stalls 100 feet above ground in Texas appeared first on KalingaTV .
